_description: Canned Linear MCP response for the linear-ticket-trigger self-test. Same shape as self-test/fixtures/linear/mock-list-issues-response.json (per docs/linear-tool-contract.md), but curated to exercise the pickup-dispatch filter: 2 tickets in 'Todo' (ready to pick up) + 1 in 'In Progress' (Commander already working on it, must be filtered out). After filtering through state_transitions.on_pickup='In Progress', the dispatcher should emit exactly 2 entries.

issues.title: Add docstrings to the public API in web.py
issues.description: Several public functions in web.py lack docstrings. Add Google-style docstrings to every top-level function.

issues.title: Factor duplicated validation logic into shared helper
issues.description: src/validators/*.ts repeats the same null-check pattern in 8 places. Extract into a shared utility and call it from each site.

issues.title: Commander already working on this one
issues.description: This ticket is already in a commander-managed state ('In Progress'). The pickup dispatcher MUST filter it out so a second worker doesn't get spawned on top of the first.
